titleStmt.title: SII 16.261: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 261. (A.R. No. 82 of 1915.) PEDDA AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the court-yard of the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.
The Śaka year and other details of the date are lost. The cyclic year Rudhirōdgārin during the king's reign corresponded with 1563 A.D.

It records the construction of a four pillared maṇḍapa and a maṭham and registers the grant of a piece of land in the village of Chinnakōmerala in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma by Parāṁkuśa van Saṭhagōpa-jīyyaṁgāru stipulating that the income derived from this gift land was to be utilised for the offerings on occasions when god Ahōbalēśvara was seated in the maṇḍapa during the pañcha-parvas when he was taken out in procession from the hill down and back again.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṇi sirō
śrī narasiṁhaśca dē
bhyu daya śālivāhana śakava
gunēṭi rudhirōdgāri saṁvatsara phā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
dēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁ
rūḍhuṁḍai pṛdhvīsāṁbrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁ
śrīmatērāmānujāya namaḥ śrīmadvēdamārga
pratiṣṭhācārya paramahaṁsa parivrācakācārya sarvataṁtra
svataṁtra vubhayavēdāṁtācāryulaina śrīparāṁkuśa śrī
van śaṭhagōpa jiyyaṁgāru Akhilāṁḍakōṭibraṁhāṁḍa
nāyakulaina vēdavēdāṁttavēdyulaina purāṇa puruṣōttamu
laina caturdaśabhuvanādhīśvarulaina śrīAhōbalēśvarula
divyaśrīcaraṇāraviṁdaṁbulaku Anaṁtamulaina daṁḍamu
lu samarpiṁci yicina silāśāsana kramameṭlannanu
nagari mīdanu maṭhaṁ kaṭiṁci śrīAhōbalēśvarulu
vēṁcēśē Aṭugānu nālgukaṁbhāla maṁḍapaṁ kaṭi
ṁcci yī maṁḍḍapaṁ mīdanu śrīAhōbalēśvarulu
paṁccaparvālanu vubhaya tiruṇāḷanu nagarimīda
nuṁḍi diguvaku vēṁcēśē Apuḍu diguvanuṁḍi nagari mī
diki vēṁccēśē Apuḍu Āragiṁccē Aṁdulku polivuṭu
viḍicina vivaraṁ ghaṁḍikōṭa sīmalōnu cinakomerlla
nu naṁdēla cinavōbannaṁgāri kṛiṣṇama rājuṁgāru ta
maku dānapatraṁ yicci samarppiṁccina cēnu kha . pa
ṁdu miṁṭiki guttacēnu 1ki va ga 1 . lekhanu guttaro
khaṁ va ga 15 Akṣarālāma padiyēnu varahālaku
kōvilanu viḍicē davasaṁ dōśalapaḍi . ku dōśalu
40 ki biyama 2 ki Ö . ki minupa bēḷu ma . ki Ö0 =
neI ci . ku Ö0 ± vuppu maṁ ± kivi . paṁcadhā
ra vī 1 ki Ö0-vaṁṭacarakulu vi . svayiṁpāki
vi . piṁḍidaṁcēvāriki vi . verasi pūṁṭa 1 ki Ö1
lekhanu nela 1ki paṁccaparvālaku pūṁṭalu 5 lekha
nu Ē 1ki pūṁṭalu 60 vutsava perumāḷu vēṁcēśē
rākapōka pūṁṭalu 16 Anusaṁdhāna tiru
ṇāḷa pūṁṭalu 10 vuṁjali tiruṇāḷa pūṁ
ṭalu vasaṁttaparva pūṁṭalu 20 yēkādaśi parva
pūṁṭalu 2 ki verasi pūṁṭalu 3 ki Ö�3 ki
selē ghaṭi va ga 10 . 5 I mariyādanu śrīAhō
balēśvarulu Āragiṁccinamīdaṭanu dōśalu 40
ki svāmyāla vivaraṁ polivuṭu maṭhānaku 5 nnu
gademīdi jiyyaṁgāriki 1 krayānaku 16 nnu
maṭha vākiṭanu maṁḍapaṁ muṁdara viniyōga
ṁ 17 verasi dōśalu 40 yī dharmaṁ Ācaṁdrā
rkasdhāyigānu naḍacēṭaṭugānu śēśi samarpistimi
śrīrāmānujiyyaṁgāri nityaśēva . svadattā
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ .
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bha
vēt . śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
